dnd5e-divinitypoints.resourceNote: The name used for the Divinity Points feature item (default: Divinity Points).
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpResourceBarActive: Show Divinity Points bar on character sheet
Displays a resource bar in the character sheet sidebar.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpGmOnly: Only the GM may edit the Divinity Points item
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpGmOnlyNote: Uncheck to allow players to configure the item from their character sheet.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpChatPrivate: Make Divinity Points usage messages private
dnd5e-divinitypoints.dpChatPrivateHint: Whispers expenditure messages to the GM only.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.alreadyDpItemOwned: This character already has a Divinity Points item. Please remove the duplicate.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.updateDpMaxTooltip: Re-evaluate the formula and update the maximum.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.noDpItem: {actorName} does not have a Divinity Points feature on their sheet.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.notEnoughDp: {actorName} does not have enough {dpResource} to use this ability.
dnd5e-divinitypoints.starterItemReady: Divinity Points: "{name}" has been added to your world's Items tab. Drag it onto any character sheet to grant them Divinity Points. To make an ability cost Divinity Points, open it → Activation → Consumption → add entry → Type: Divinity Points.
